title: Work-order condition editor
definition: The native work-order surface that presents existing item conditions, their next-check state, and generated suggested conditions for one selected order.

facts.statement: The editor presents existing item-condition rows and a separate Suggested conditions section for the selected work order.
A suggested row remains listed when its filter identity matches an existing item condition; matching affects the row's add action rather than the row's text visibility.

uncertainties.statement: The suggestion rows and add-control state are self-contained in recorder v2, but the editor still lacks a bound capture of the same existing condition in both satisfied and unsatisfied states.

positive: An order with at least one existing item condition and all generated suggested rows visible.
boundary: The same suggested filter both with and without an existing matching condition.
counterexamples: A matching existing condition must not remove the suggested row's text from the Suggested conditions section.

absenceGuards: Do not hide an entire suggested row merely because its filter matches an existing condition.
Do not apply a condition's next-check status styling to its operator, quantity, or item description.

requiredFrames: Editor with no matching existing condition
Editor with a matching existing condition
The same existing row in satisfied and unsatisfied states
